/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -s CMakeFiles/test_verbose.dir/test_verbose.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_verbose.dir/aclblas_sger.cpp.o -o test_verbose   -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/tools/simulator/ascend910b2/lib  lib/libsger_kernel.a -lascendcl -lruntime /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/lib64/libascendc_runtime.a -ltiling_api -lregister -lplatform -lerror_manager -lprofapi -lge_common_base -lascendalog -lmmpa -ldl -lascend_dump -lc_sec
